name: Professional Portfolio Website MVP
idea: Development of a professional portfolio website featuring a clean landing page layout. Key components include an 'About Me' section (bio), a project showcase area, and a functional contact form. The project scope is focused on simplicity and professional presentation.
guideline: Adhere to Acme Product Studio values by prioritizing fast iteration and a clean, simple MVP scope using the preferred Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind stack.

timeline.deliverable: Functional landing page with About, Projects, and Contact form
